summary: Tested DE/EN translation system for EuroAdria Investment Platform. All features working correctly: language toggle (desktop/mobile), static UI translations via JSON files, backend translate API via MyMemory, cookie consent translation, YouTube slider translation, footer translation, and localStorage persistence.

minor.issue: Single-word translations may produce unexpected results (e.g., 'Welt' -> 'oppression'). This is a MyMemory API quirk, not a bug in the implementation.

language_toggle_desktop.description: Globe icon button with data-testid='language-toggle-desktop' visible in header, toggles between EN/DE

language_toggle_mobile.description: Language toggle button with data-testid='language-toggle-mobile' visible in mobile menu, shows 'English'/'Deutsch'

nav_items_translation.description: Navigation items translate correctly: IMMOBILIENANGEBOT<->REAL ESTATE, ÜBER UNS<->ABOUT US, KONTAKT<->CONTACT, etc.

hero_section_translation.description: Hero title/subtitle translate: 'Firmengründung, Aufenthalt & Investments...' <-> 'Company Formation, Residency & Investments...'

footer_translation.description: Footer links translate: Rechtliches<->Legal, Impressum<->Imprint, Datenschutz<->Privacy Policy, AGB<->Terms & Conditions

cookie_consent_translation.description: Cookie banner translates: Cookie-Einstellungen<->Cookie Settings, Alle akzeptieren<->Accept All, Datenschutzerklärung<->Privacy Policy

youtube_slider_translation.description: YouTube section translates: YOUTUBE KANAL<->YOUTUBE CHANNEL, Unsere neuesten Videos<->Our Latest Videos, Kanal abonnieren<->Subscribe to Channel

backend_translate_api.description: POST /api/translate works with MyMemory API, returns translatedText, source, target

backend_translate_article_api.description: GET /api/translate/article/{slug} returns 404 for non-existent articles (no articles in DB to test full flow)

language_persistence.description: Language preference persists in localStorage (key: 'ea_lang') and survives page reload

context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation system is fully working. Static UI text uses JSON files (de.json/en.json) loaded via LanguageContext. Dynamic content uses backend MyMemory API with MongoDB caching. The /api/translate/article/{slug} endpoint couldn't be fully tested as no articles exist in the database.

translation_system_architecture.static_ui_text: JSON files at /app/frontend/src/i18n/de.json and en.json, loaded via LanguageContext.jsx
translation_system_architecture.dynamic_content: Backend /api/translate endpoint using MyMemory API (https://api.mymemory.translated.net) with MongoDB caching
